case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY HUTCH AND HUTCH BAIL BONDS
REIMBURSEMENT FOR FILING FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY HUTCH AND HUTCH BAIL BONDS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,583.00, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY HUTCH AND HUTCH BAIL BONDS
